## What changed

Describe the smallest useful change in this pull request.

## Verification

- [ ] Local tests pass
- [ ] Demo still runs if this change affects workflow behavior
- [ ] Sample report regenerates if this change affects reports

## Public boundary check

- [ ] Uses toy or synthetic examples only
- [ ] Does not include private data, production logs, real receipts, or deployment details
- [ ] Does not add private-system references

## Claim discipline

- [ ] Does not claim production safety, deployment readiness, AGI evaluation, consciousness detection, universal alignment, or certification
- [ ] Any new claim is tied to a test, fixture, documented scope, or limitation
- [ ] Unsupported claims remain explicitly caveated

## Reviewer path

Briefly explain how a reviewer should inspect or run this change.
